name: True Love...Mother Isn't Pleased
original_name: รักแท้แม่ไม่ปลื้ม
overview: Pat and Parn have been together for five years. They get married and move into Pat's mom's home. Pat's mom loves him a lot and doesn't want to share him with Parn. She quarrels with Parn to drive her away. Pat will have to find a way to make his mother and wife live in harmony.

trailers.title: TRAILER รักแท้แม่ไม่ปลื้ม | ทุกวันพุธ 2 ทุ่ม | เริ่ม 5 ต.ค.2559 | ช่อง one 31
